name: Mandarin Orange Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni shells in salted boiling water until tender, then cool.
2. Boil 3 chicken breasts until done. Skin and dice into chunks.
3. Add the cooked macaroni, diced chicken, and grapes to a bowl.
4. Drain any juice from the mandarin oranges and set aside.
5. Mix the mayonnaise with the juice of the mandarins until smooth.
6. Pour this mixture over the macaroni, chicken, and grapes.
7. Top with slivered almonds.
